title: glochidion lambiricum
intro: Glochidion lambiricum, also known as Lambir Hill Glochidion, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a small tree or shrub that is native to Borneo, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin diseases, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared by making herbal teas or infusions from its leaves, which are then consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
